nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned value and change fields

compositionPolicy.calendar: A localized grid and native date entry share one canonical date-only value.
compositionPolicy.availability: Unavailable dates remain non-selectable; explanation nodes and described-by output exist only when showAvailabilityExplanations is true.
compositionPolicy.form: The labelled native date input owns validation, serialization, reset, mobile picker, and autofill behavior.
compositionPolicy.rangeHighlight: Optional range attributes and preview events exist only when a range consumer enables them; standalone Calendar defaults remain unchanged.
